'''Lemmi VI''' was a rainforest [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Lemmi system/Legends|Lemmi system]] of the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]]. It was home to the carnivorous [[Millennium blossom]], as well as several other huge creatures. One beast moved about on pogo-stick legs, crushing all its path.
{{Planet-stub}}
